abstract.para: Agriculture is the primary source of the powerful greenhouse gas (GHG) nitrous oxide (N2O) and an important source of GHG emissions. Due to sampling limitations, N2O measurements have traditionally been sparse; with research studies that often have less than 50 sampled days within a year. Nitrous oxide emissions are highly variable and short-lived peak emission periods may contribute more than 50% to annual emissions. Gap filling around these peaks, if measured at all, can result in poor estimations under the standard practice using linear interpolation. Improved gap filling methods that reflect covariate data will likely reduce uncertainty and improve annual N2O estimates. The Global N2O Database was created to serve as a repository for these datasets as well as become a resource for publicly available data and analytical advances. These datasets have been joined in data sheets that use the same formatting, allowing for easy access and comparison of data sets. We hope that this data availability will lead to improvements in N2O understanding and mitigation.

intellectualRights.para: This information is released under the Creative Commons license - Attribution - CC BY (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/). The consumer of these data (\"Data User\" herein) is required to cite it appropriately in any publication that results from its use. The Data User should realize that these data may be actively used by others for ongoing research and that coordination may be necessary to prevent duplicate publication. The Data User is urged to contact the authors of these data if any questions about methodology or results occur. Where appropriate, the Data User is encouraged to consider collaboration or co-authorship with the authors. The Data User should realize that misinterpretation of data may occur if used out of context of the original study. While substantial efforts are made to ensure the accuracy of data and associated documentation, complete accuracy of data sets cannot be guaranteed. All data are made available \"as is.\" The Data User should be aware, however, that data are updated periodically and it is the responsibility of the Data User to check for new versions of the data. The data authors and the repository where these data were obtained shall not be liable for damages resulting from any use or misinterpretation of the data. Thank you.

description.para: N2O can be measured by a variety of methods. Please check the 'siteSummary' and 'cumulativeN2O' data sheets to see how these data sets were measured. Please check Dorich et al., 2020 (https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cosust.2020.04.006) for further scientific background and creation information related to the Global N2O Database.

dataTable.entityDescription: Sitelibrary - overview of site-treatments and associated basic meta-data

attribute.attributeDefinition: first version of the Global N2O Database that this site was present for
email contact information of the data provider

textDomain.definition: email contact information of the data provider

attribute.attributeDefinition: If the data is published at another repository or location, provide DOI or web link

textDomain.definition: If the data is published at another repository or location, provide DOI or web link

attribute.attributeDefinition: DOI of the primary paper related to this dataset

textDomain.definition: DOI of the primary paper related to this dataset

attribute.attributeDefinition: DOI of a secondary paper related to the dataset, if available

textDomain.definition: DOI of a secondary paper related to the dataset, if available

attribute.attributeDefinition: number of treatments examined in the experiment
most common type of N applied

textDomain.definition: most common type of N applied

attribute.attributeDefinition: number of days n2o was sampled during the experiment
number of missing days during the experimental period
percent of experimental period that is missing values
covariates available with the data set

textDomain.definition: covariates available with the data set

attribute.attributeDefinition: any additional notes for the site-treatment

textDomain.definition: any additional notes for the site-treatment

dataTable.entityDescription: Summary - futher meta-data and site level information

attribute.attributeDefinition: average amount of nitrogen applied to the site
percentage of carbon in the soil
percentage of nitorgen in the soil
measurement of the acidity or alkalinity of the soil
type of drainage system used in plot

textDomain.definition: type of drainage system used in plot

attribute.attributeDefinition: crop grown in plot before experiment

textDomain.definition: crop grown in plot before experiment

attribute.attributeDefinition: resiudes left in the field after the crop is harvested
mode of applying fertilizer under the given method

textDomain.definition: mode of applying fertilizer under the given method

attribute.attributeDefinition: inidication of if OMAD was applied

textDomain.definition: inidication of if OMAD was applied

attribute.attributeDefinition: Carbon to nitrogen ratio of applied OMAD
total amount nitrogen per hectare applied
amount of time chamber was recording

dataTable.entityDescription: cumulative - annual and duration of sampling n2o sums

attribute.attributeDefinition: amount of N (fertilizer, residue, manure) applied that year
number of times nitrogen was applied
year n2o samples started to be collected
year n2o samples stopped being collected
cumulative annual n2o as reported by data provider
cumulative n2o as reported by data provider for period reported in sample.period
cumulative n2o during a crop period

textDomain.definition: cumulative n2o during a crop period

attribute.attributeDefinition: crop being grown during that year

textDomain.definition: crop being grown during that year

attribute.attributeDefinition: n2o sample method (e.g., manual chamber, auto chamber, eddy covariance, etc)

textDomain.definition: n2o sample method (e.g., manual chamber, auto chamber, eddy covariance, etc)

attribute.attributeDefinition: numer of samples taken during that year
duration (days) of the sample period (e.g., 365 days)
commonly: linear, GAMs, ARIMA, or whatever they note in publication for how data was gap-filled

textDomain.definition: commonly: linear, GAMs, ARIMA, or whatever they note in publication for how data was gap-filled

dataTable.entityDescription: crop yield - crop yield data associted with n2o data

attribute.attributeDefinition: type of treatment applied to plot

textDomain.definition: type of treatment applied to plot

attribute.attributeDefinition: Year the crop was harvested in
Date the crop was harvested on
Any notes about crop info at the site

textDomain.definition: Any notes about crop info at the site

attribute.attributeDefinition: Dry Matter weight of grain harvest yield
Dry Matter (DM) weight of all aboveground biomass
Dry Matter weight of shoots harvest yield
percent of carbon measured in the shoots/straw
percent of nitrogen measured in the shoots/straw
percent of carbon measured in the grains
percent of nitrogen measured in the grains
Percent of protein measured in the crop
Percent of crude protein measured in the crop
Total nitrogen harvest in grains kgN/ha
Total carbon harvest in grains kgC/ha
Total nitrogen harvest in shoots kgN/ha
Total carbon harvest in shoots kgC/ha
Dry Matter weight of straw harvest yield
straw remaining in field after harvest (DM)
carbon in straw remaining in field after harvest
Total nitrogen removed from plot in harvest, any part of plant, kgN/ha
Carbon to nitrogen ratio in grain
Carbon to nitrogen ratio in shoots/straw
Carbon to nitrogen ratio in roots

dataTable.entityDescription: daily ghg - Daily N2O data along with covariates measured at the sites

attribute.attributeDefinition: type of treatment applied to plot

textDomain.definition: type of treatment applied to plot

attribute.attributeDefinition: Amount of N applied to site
percent of sand in the soil
percent of silt in the soil
percent of clay in the soil
total solar radiation measured that day
amount of irrigation water added that day
soil temperature measured a soil depth of five centimeters
soil temperature measured a soil depth of ten centimeters
soil temperature measured a soil depth of fifteen centimeters
depth of soil temperature measurement for x profile
soil moisture at 0cm depth, soil surface
depth of wfps soil moisture measurement
Mean dissolved organic carbon present in plots
maximum wind speed measured that day
standard deviation of the CH4 (ch4) flux
measured carbon oxide flux in sample
standard deviation of the CO2 (co2) flux
measured nitrous oxide flux in sample
standard deviation of that sample if available
revised water filled pore space in the sheet with >100 days
month the sample was in, for dplyr calls
year of the sample, for use in dplyr functions

unit.name: tonnePerHectare
unit.description: metric ton or tonne per hectare

unit.name: megajoulePerMeterSquaredPerDay
unit.description: megajoules per square meter per day
